About me

I was born in Saint-Petersburg (year unknown :) and im still living here in Petersburg. Im currently studying Computer Science as a self-taught. Im currently unemployed and not searching for any offers. Right now im not in Saint-Petersburg, so im not near my PC.

I like Game Development and Linux. Also, Arduino and electronics.
